query:
UPDATE error_groups g
SET
    occurrence_count = (
        SELECT COUNT(*)::int
        FROM error_occurrences
        WHERE error_group_id = g.id
          AND deleted_at IS NULL
    ),
    last_seen_at = COALESCE(
        (
            SELECT MAX(created_at)
            FROM error_occurrences
            WHERE error_group_id = g.id
              AND deleted_at IS NULL
        ),
        g.created_at
    ),
    updated_at = now()
WHERE g.id = ANY($1)
